title: Kadhal Vanthal Solli Anuppu Lyrics
stanzas:
sutta mannile meenaaga
manam vetta veliyilae vaaduthadi
kanneer kalandhu
kanneer kalandhu
kadal neermattam kooduthadi.

uyirai thavira sondhamillaiye
kadhalikkum munbu
indha ulagae endhan
sondhamanathe kadhal
vandha pinbu.

saavai azhaithu
kaditham potten
kadhalikkum munbu.
oru saavai pudhaikka
sakthi kaetkiren
kadhal vandha pinbu.

unnaal en kadal alai
urangave illai.
unnaal en nilavukku
udal nalam illai.

kadal thuyil kolvadhum
nila gunam kolvadhum
naan uyir vazhvadhum
un sollil ullathadi.

pirandha mannai
allithindren unnai
kaanum munbu.
nee nadantha mannai
allithindren unnai
kanda pinbu.

annai thandhai kandathillai
naan kanthirandha pinbu.
en aththanai uravum
moththam kanden
unnai kanda pinbu.

penne en payanamo
thodangave illai.
adharkkum adhu mudivathaa
vilangave illai.

nan karai aavadhum
illai nurai aavadhum
valarpirari aavadhum
un sollil ullathadi.

solli anuppu
Kadhal vandhal
solli anuppu
solli anuppu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Vanthal Solli Anuppu?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and heartbreak.

Who composed the music for Iyarkai?

The music for Iyarkai was composed by Vidyasagar.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Tipu.

What is the release year of the movie Iyarkai?

The movie Iyarkai was released in 2003.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of melancholy and romantic longing.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kadhal Vanthal Solli Anuppu is a soulful melody from the movie Iyarkai, capturing the essence of unrequited love and longing. The song's lyrics express deep emotions of heartbreak and yearning, beautifully rendered by Tipu's evocative voice. Vidyasagar's composition enhances the melancholic mood, making it a memorable piece for those experiencing love's bittersweet moments. The song's poignant theme resonates with anyone who has felt the pangs of love and separation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadhal Vanthal Solli Anuppu from the movie Iyarkai is a poignant melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Tipu and composed by Vidyasagar, this song beautifully conveys deep emotions through its soulful lyrics. Experience the magic of Vidyasagar's music as it intertwines with Tipu's heartfelt vocals, creating an unforgettable musical journey.
stanzaMeanings: If love comes, let me know, I will come if I am alive.
I am lying on the shore, melting away with tears flowing.
In the burnt sand, like a fish, my heart is struggling outside, mixed with tears, the sea level has risen.
If love comes, let me know, I will come if I am alive.
I have no relations except life itself. Before love, this world was mine. After love came.
I wrote a letter inviting death before love. After love, I ask for strength to bury a death.
Because of you, my sea waves don't rest. Because of you, my moon is not healthy.
The sea sleeping, the moon gaining its qualities, my life continuing, all depend on your words.
Your presence is killing me, killing me.
If love comes, let me know, I will come if I am alive.
I gave away the land I was born on before seeing you. I gave away the land you walked on after seeing you.
I didn't see my parents after I was born. I saw all my relations after seeing you.
Girl, my journey hasn't started. It doesn't seem to have an end either.
I can't become the shore, or the foam, or the waves, it all depends on your words.
Your presence is killing me, killing me.
